report.summary: Built two comprehensive learn guides: Layer 3 Chains Guide 2026 (covering L3 architecture, Arbitrum Orbit, key projects like Xai/Degen Chain/ApeChain, and investment strategies) and MPC Wallets Guide 2026 (covering multi-party computation, MPC vs multisig vs smart wallets comparison, top providers like Fireblocks/Zengo, and institutional custody trends).

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Layer 3 chains have become DeFi's default infrastructure in 2026 — Arbitrum Orbit powers 50+ L3 deployments with 250ms block times and near-zero fees
Key L3 projects: Xai (gaming, 500K+ wallets), Degen Chain (Base Orbit, $100M+ volume at launch), ApeChain (APE gas token, Stylus support), Orbs (execution overlay for TWAP/limit orders)
Vitalik Buterin's concern about L3s parasitizing L2 fee revenue remains a key debate point; liquidity fragmentation is the primary risk
MPC wallets split private keys into shares using Distributed Key Generation (DKG) and Threshold Signature Schemes (TSS) — no single party ever holds the full key
Fireblocks leads institutional MPC with 1,800+ institutions and $150B+ monthly transfers; Zengo brings MPC to retail with seedless wallets
MPC vs Multisig vs Smart Wallets: MPC is chain-agnostic and institutional-grade; multisig is transparent and on-chain; smart wallets offer programmable rules and social recovery
MPC lacks NIST standardization in 2026, creating regulatory uncertainty for US-regulated financial institutions
Enterprise custody has evolved from backend requirement to board-level strategic pillar with tokenized assets valued in trillions

sections.title: Content Created
items: Layer 3 Chains Guide 2026 — ~3,000 word comprehensive guide covering architecture, key projects (6 cards), L3 vs L2 comparison table, use cases (gaming/DeFi/social/enterprise), risks, investment strategies, and 6-item FAQ with interactive expand/collapse

MPC Wallets Guide 2026 — ~3,500 word guide covering MPC technical mechanics (DKG, TSS, key refresh), comparison table (MPC vs Multisig vs Smart Wallets across 8 dimensions), top 5 providers (Fireblocks, Fordefi, Zengo, Coinbase WaaS, Liminal), advantages grid, risks, and 6-item interactive FAQ

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Layer 3 Guide — Title: 'Layer 3 Chains Guide 2026: L3 Architecture, Top Projects & How to Invest', Target keyword: 'layer 3 blockchain', Internal links to: /learn/layer-2-scaling-guide, /learn/appchains-app-specific-rollups-guide-2026, /learn/arbitrum-ecosystem, /learn/base-ecosystem, /tools/gas-tracker

MPC Wallets Guide — Title: 'MPC Wallets Guide 2026: Multi-Party Computation Security Explained', Target keyword: 'MPC wallet crypto', Internal links to: /learn/smart-wallets-guide-2026, /learn/crypto-wallet-security-guide-2026, /learn/cold-storage-seed-phrase-security-guide-2026, /learn/crypto-custody-guide-2026, /wallets/best
Both pages include FAQ sections optimized for Google 'People Also Ask' featured snippets
Both pages added to PUBLISHED_PAGES in published-pages.ts (batch 16)
